selected_plan.title: Deliver a first Codex consumer for Uigwe
selected_plan.summary: Implement the first pluggable consumer that consumes executable leaves, respects dependencies, and applies selective critic plus broad verifier behavior.

retained_alternatives.title: Manual consumer first
retained_alternatives.summary: Produce planning outputs first and defer all execution wiring.
cons: Weak validation of the consumer contract

retained_alternatives.title: Team consumer first
retained_alternatives.summary: Optimize for coordinated multi-agent execution before a single-session Codex lane exists.
cons: Too much indirection for the first release

nodes.title: Ship a usable Codex consumer for Uigwe
nodes.description: Provide a default consumer that can execute Uigwe leaves inside Codex without collapsing the protocol into an execution-only tool.
nodes.why: Uigwe needs a reference consumer to prove that Plan Packets are actionable.
acceptance_criteria: Executable leaves can be dispatched in dependency order
High-risk leaves can opt into critic review
Leaves expose verification instructions suitable for a verifier lane
constraints: Planner and consumer responsibilities must stay separate
assumptions: Codex subagents are available for at least some execution paths
risks: Consumer contract may be underspecified for high-risk leaves

nodes.title: Define the consumer-facing leaf contract
nodes.description: Specify the minimum fields and invariants required for a leaf to be executable by a Codex consumer.
nodes.why: The consumer cannot safely dispatch leaves unless the leaf contract is explicit.
acceptance_criteria: Leaf fields cover scope, done criteria, dependencies, and verification
Contract is compatible with Plan Packet output
constraints: Do not force all leaves to use critic review
assumptions: File scope can be expressed as paths or ownership areas
risks: Too little structure causes execution ambiguity

nodes.title: Define dispatch and review policy
nodes.description: Capture how leaves are ordered, when parallel execution is safe, and when critic or verifier lanes are applied.
nodes.why: The consumer needs predictable dispatch behavior or it will erase Uigwe's planning guarantees.
acceptance_criteria: Critic policy is selective and risk-based
constraints: Do not re-plan inside the consumer
assumptions: Some leaves can run in parallel without shared write scope
risks: Parallel dispatch can conflict on overlapping files

nodes.title: Write the leaf contract into the packet schema
nodes.description: Add consumer-facing leaf task fields to the Uigwe packet schema draft.
nodes.why: The contract should exist as machine-readable schema, not just prose.
acceptance_criteria: Risk, verification, and consumer hints are represented
constraints: Keep the first schema draft small enough to evolve
assumptions: JSON Schema is an acceptable first contract format
risks: Over-modeling the first draft could slow iteration
done_criteria: Leaf task schema fields are added
Example leaf validates structurally against the contract

verification.description: Leaf fields align with Codex consumer needs

nodes.title: Write the consumer policy into the protocol doc
nodes.description: Document the dispatch rules, selective critic policy, and verifier expectations.
nodes.why: The protocol needs a human-readable explanation of how the consumer should behave.
acceptance_criteria: Verifier policy is broad by default
constraints: Do not blur planning and execution responsibilities
assumptions: A prose doc remains necessary even with a schema
risks: The doc may drift from the schema if they evolve independently
done_criteria: Protocol doc explains dispatch, critic, and verifier behavior

verification.description: Policy text is consistent with the packet contract

risk_summary.description: Protocol prose and packet schema may drift if versioned separately.
risk_summary.mitigation: Treat schema and protocol edits as one review unit.

risk_summary.description: Parallel leaf execution can overlap on write scope unless file ownership is explicit.
risk_summary.mitigation: Require explicit file scope before a leaf can be marked parallel-safe.
